meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Biohacking Village - Bill Hagestad  - Chinese Military Lab Mission + COVID-19
meta.description: Chinese Military Labratory Mission + COVID-19 discusses respectful research regarding military labs in the People's Republic of China and potential implications for weaponizing viruses, such as COVID-19. Audience will receive a filled experienced trip in the Chinese Military bio-weapons programs.
